transcript.text:
So how long is the wait usually?
1 hour?
I don't think I can be back even if I want to
[Tastes even better after waiting]
[Daerim Guksu] How good can it be?
[Let's see what it's all about]
[Noodles first]
[Skewers]
[Seongsu-dong has been trending on SNS lately]
Hello everyone
I'm at Seongsu-dong today
Here for a very "hot-place"
There's constantly a line at this restaurant except for their break hours
I've been wanting to try it but I couldn't
They graciously let me film during their break hours So I ran over here
Ta-da Here

[Daerim Guksu] [Seoul Seongsu-dong]
They sell noodles and skewers How good is it for people to wait in line for that long?
Hello
[Let's order]
-Are these all available? -Yes
So these 4 noodles?
I will take 1 of each
1 of every skewer as well, please
-From here to there? -Yes
I'll have those ready for you
[Kkochi Onmyun] (skewer noodles)
[Nengmyun] (buckwheat cold noodles)
[Bibim myun] [sweet & spicy noodles)
[Kkochi Red Noodles] (spicy skewer noodles)
Thank you Which one is this?
[Coming in 1 by 1]

Thank you
We are out of cod roe and tomato skewers today
They looked so appetizing on social media Let's go ahead and get started right away
Bon appetit
1 skewer first from the noodles
Not dry at all
Tender and meaty
Chicken skewer
Which one is this?
Kyunbong meat? Where's that?
They said it's the shoulders
Onmyun It has some type of meat inside
Oh no!
Let's just eat
Yes, this is it
The noodles...

Incredibly good
The idea of having skewers inside the soup is great
A container for the sticks
The noodles It's unimaginably elastic
It just dances in your mouth
It has a kick to it
Strong flavors
Really tasty
I see why people wait
I love how the noodles are
Let's eat some skewers
Beef large intestine
Dip it
These are popular too nowadays
They're very greasy
But the flavors are amazing

I love the texture
Delicious
Some red soup too
It's thick
Will it be spicy?
Deep flavors
You can taste the spice
It's good
These are with the nenmyun But separately because it's cold noodles
Dipped with mayonnaise
It tastes so good with mayo
These come with cucumbers but I can't eat those so they took those out for me
These noodles look great too
Will it be like Chinese-styled cold noodles?
Goes well as hot noodles and also as cold noodles
This is great Tastes so good

It's even more elastic
Chicken skin
What kind of dipping is this?
Sometimes it's hard to tell what 1 particular item is if you're tasting a lot of flavors
I have no idea
It's cheese mayo
Yes, that's right
Mayo with cheese
Let's mix the egg yolk
Soft tofu, mushrooms,
And much more This has a lot of toppings
I know what this is
Some type of knee cartilage
Really soft and has small bones
Really good
What is their secret?

So good
Which meat is this?
Chicken wings?
They flattened out the meat Cool
It reminds me of the buffalo wings I had last night
I should have some veggies now
I like green onions though They're good
The asparagus is the problem
But I've never had it before
Not bad?
Should be good with meat
Pork belly
Almost like bacon wrapped
Soft tofu jjamppong?
The Onmyun is soy sauce based
This one is really just like jjamppong (spicy seafood noodles)

We're more familiar with this kind of taste
As for Nengmyun...
It's a little more refreshing
Hard to explain
Tastes even better right now
This rarely happens
It's starting to get spicy
The soup itself is not spicy but the Peperoncino that's inside
And also the pepper seeds
I need some Nengmyun now
Onmyun tasted best when the noodles were a bit soggy
I need to order some for to-go
I remember the taste of chicken neck meat
It was really good
It just looks like those
I'm starting to guess correctly

Ginkgo berry
This tastes almost deep-fried
The inside is cooked too
Crispy
This must be the...
[Cheating] Meatball
Eggplants too?
I wonder if this will be good
Looks good though
It's not fully cooked It still has the hard consistency
Tastes really good
The sauce is soaked in really well
This can be difficult to eat if you're not good with spicy foods
Somewhere in between Shin ramyun and Buldak noodles
It's edible but still pretty spicy
Boiled egg

Chicken heart and garlic together
It's so good like this
No more space
What's this?
What happened?
What is all this?
Mayo?
Crazy how that happens
Did I feed my clothes?
Lastly
Must eat it like this too
This tastes like Chinese cuisine
Strong garlic flavors in the sauce
Very strong
1 last skewer
It won't go in

Are you okay?
What was your favorite?
The red noodles for me
These 2 were very good
-Come again! -Yes, I will be back
How long do people normally have to wait?
About 1 hour?
I don't think I can be back even if I want to
But the noodles were really delicious
They were also very unique
I had a great meal
Thanks everyone
[A round of applause]
Thank you so much for letting me film during your break hours! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
